author: Bastions
text:
create lifecycle event; resolve drop as observe-only participation

create (SPEC §6.1): first-class describe-gated Event variant; bl create dispatches Event::Create, not Event::Update. Legacy byte-identical via legacy_subscriptions gaining Create (legacy push wire carries no event name).

drop (SPEC §6.2): observe-only Event::Drop. bl drop notifies subscribed native plugins best-effort and can never be blocked; legacy mapping omits Drop so bl drop stays byte-identical for legacy. Config validation rejects required/gating on drop.

Conformance: e2e create-is-gated + drop-observe-only, plus unit coverage of the validate branch and wire mapping. create/drop now known, so forward-compat tests switch to a still-unknown token. Suite green, 100% coverage.
